overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West featuring the protagonist Aloy traversing a lush tropical jungle environment. The character runs through dense vegetation before entering and wading through a shallow river surrounded by palm trees, rocky cliffs, and scattered mechanical debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense tropical jungle trail with mechanical debris

events.description: approaching the river bank, water becomes visible through the vegetation ahead

agents.ego_description: Aloy is running through dense jungle vegetation toward a river, navigating around plants and rocks

entered.detail: tall tropical palm trees with visible trunks and fronds scattered throughout the jungle
large rocky cliff formation with layered sedimentary rock visible in the background
thick ground cover of large green leaves and tropical plants covering the jungle floor
dark metallic mechanical wreckage or inactive machine parts scattered on the ground

segments.scene_description: Aloy runs through a dense tropical jungle with thick undergrowth and tall palm trees. Rocky cliffs rise in the background to the right while mechanical debris lies scattered on the ground. The camera follows from behind as she approaches a river visible through the vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow tropical river with rocky banks

events.description: character enters the river and movement changes from running to wading through water
lily pads appear floating on the water surface as the river widens

agents.ego_description: Aloy is wading through the shallow river water, moving steadily downstream with splashing footsteps

entered.detail: shallow clear water covering the ground with visible sandy bottom and ripples
boulders and large rocks emerging from the water and lining the river banks
circular green lily pads floating on the water surface
rocky formations and boulders along the distant river bank

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide shallow river as Aloy wades through the water. The dense jungle undergrowth gives way to rocky banks lined with palm trees. Large boulders emerge from the water and lily pads float on the surface as the character continues downstream through the sunlit tropical environment, with rocky cliffs now visible on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense tropical jungle that gradually opens into a wide, sunlit riverbed. It begins with the camera trailing behind Aloy as she runs through thick undergrowth and tall palm trees, passing scattered mechanical debris with rocky cliffs rising in the distance. As she pushes through the vegetation, the scene expands into a shallow river where the dense foliage gives way to rocky banks and floating lily pads. The camera continues to follow her downstream through the water, shifting the perspective as large boulders emerge from the surface and the rocky cliffs transition from the right to the left side of the frame.
